summary: The batch demonstrates a good variety of attributes, but there are instances of near-duplicate phrasings and a lack of edge cases in the scenarios. Additionally, some combinations of attributes are underrepresented.
overrepresented_modes: negative intent with hard difficulty and mild/moderate polarity intensity
positive intent with hard difficulty and poetic style
recommendations: Encourage the generation of more unique phrasings to reduce near-duplicates.
Include more edge cases in scenarios, such as rare combinations of difficulty and polarity intensity.
Diversify the use of styles across all intents to avoid overrepresentation.
